1.alt: Pencil sketch of Lars Odin's napkin diagram for a plasma shovel control loop, surrounded by Rim pub details.
1.caption: Napkin control-loop sketch recovered from The Rim.

2.alt: Pencil notebook plan of a future farm habitat with soil trays, goats, irrigation lines, and repair notes.
2.caption: Farm habitat notes: ordinary work, hidden order.

3.alt: Pencil sensor-analysis sheet showing a dark object, incomplete orbital arcs, warning symbols, and field-noise traces.
3.caption: Sensor sheet for an object that refuses ordinary categories.

4.alt: Pencil archive sketch of Havets Sista Sang with scarred hull plating, waveform notes, and biological cognition tank diagrams.
4.caption: Archive study of Havets Sista Sang.

5.alt: Pencil Aerit archive study of a guardian helmet identity-lock interface with memory-anchor annotations and a partial three-circle symbol.
5.caption: Aerit guardian helmet: identity-lock interface study.

6.alt: Pencil notebook sketch of a battered coffee cup, caffeine stains, and a Ragnarrök-style energy equation.
6.caption: Coffee margin notes: less theory, more movement.

9.alt: Pencil threshold model diagram with overlapping response curves, a lock gate, and noodle-like coherence signal paths.
9.caption: Threshold models and partial mindfield boundaries.

12.alt: Pencil sketch of Fastulv as a battered civilian freighter with bulky cargo hull, docking clamps, cargo doors, and repair notes.
12.caption: Fastulv: ugly freighter, old scars, same heart.

15.alt: Pencil sketch of melted sunglasses, a beef lot tag, a wine bottle, and a crossed-out apology note.
15.caption: Quiet dignity, after incident review.

18.alt: Pencil materials fatigue plate showing a cracked alloy strip, stress propagation, sensor pins, and tolerance notes.
18.caption: Materials fatigue sample, after test.

21.alt: Pencil tactical note showing three stealth ships approaching L-Prime 41 and a materials ring cross-section.
21.caption: Containment drill: insert, decoy, seal.

24.alt: Pencil archive sketch of Havskant Colony as twelve rotating habitats lashed to a modular reactor spine above bright salt flats, with algae farms, salvage yard, and NUKEA recall tag.
24.caption: Havskant Colony: twelve habitats on a reactor spine above dead salt flats.

27.alt: Pencil distributed node diagram with many loose paths and a crossed-out central heart or core.
27.caption: No single heart: local routing only.

30.alt: Pencil guardian protocol form with consent checkboxes, a farm gate latch, witness marks, and stop-authority notes.
30.caption: Consent boundary form, guardian draft.

33.alt: Pencil emergency diagram of broken coherence signal lines, desynchronized speakers, and separated evacuation routes.
33.caption: Coherence break: desynchronize and localize.

36.alt: Pencil map fragment of broken Creator gate rings and folded transit nodes around older anchor markings, with Creator-era symbols.
36.caption: Broken Creator gate map: transport built over older anchors.

38.alt: Pencil field sketch of an Aerit guardian in charcoal flex-armor steadying a coupling coil, with three interlocking circles, a deliberate crack symbol, wrong-fit assembly at the shoulder, and margin notes.
38.caption: Guardian field sketch: our symbols, no roster.

39.alt: Minimal pencil observatory diagram of the KBC Void with faint gravitational contours and a tiny receiver station.
39.caption: KBC low-observation listening note.

42.alt: Pencil hypothesis diagram of distributed routes across small cosmological bubbles and engineered coupling notes.
42.caption: The Nomad hypothesis, lowercase until proven.

45.alt: Pencil biological strategy diagram showing monopoly growth, local immune-response nodes, cut lines, and repair-team marks.
45.caption: The cancer model: contain, cut, repair.

48.alt: Pencil public hazard advisory with redacted truth blocks, municipal debt ledger marks, signatures, and an airlock gauge.
48.caption: Public advisory with private debt attached.

51.alt: Pencil artifact rubbing of a Creator door fragment with passive sensor curves and no-active-ping warning marks.
51.caption: Creator door fragment, passive study only.

54.alt: Pencil recovery sketch showing identity shards, memory anchors, a consent check, and a quiet signal thread.
54.caption: Re-becoming: remembered with choice.
